work_unit: scout-scan: exclude worktrees/ from IGNORE_DIRS to prevent .claude/worktrees/ copies inflating marker counts
situation: moni-master reported TODO=11 but only 5 are real; 6 duplicates came from .claude/worktrees/rust-rewrite/ — a full project copy used by Claude Code built-in worktree. IGNORE_DIRS had .opt-worktrees and .parallel-worktrees but not worktrees (Claude Code's dir). wechat-main also has .claude/worktrees/.
action: Added 'worktrees' to IGNORE_DIRS set in scout-scan.py (both workspace live copy and git-tracked AS copy). This excludes .claude/worktrees/* from marker counting and file indexing. Safe because .git/worktrees/ is already excluded via .git entry, and no project has a source directory named worktrees.
outcome_evidence: moni-master TODO count dropped from 11 to 5 after fix (verified via --project moni-master re-scan). wechat-main unaffected (already 0 markers).
next_suggestion: Check if the live workspace copy of scout-scan.py has other divergences from the AS-tracked copy (sizes differ: 27870 vs 27712+fix). A sync or symlink strategy would prevent future drift.
